items.title: Wolves relegated from EPL with 5 games to play
items.summary: Wolverhampton Wanderers have officially been relegated from the Premier League.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Dodgers closer Edwin Díaz to undergo elbow surgery, return timeline puts him out through All-Star break
items.summary: Díaz, who has a 10.50 ERA in seven outings with his new club, likely won't pitch again until July or August
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Alcaraz, Sabalenka, PSG win top Laureus awards
items.summary: Tennis players Carlos Alcaraz and Aryna Sabalenka were named Sportsman and Sportswoman of the Year at the Laureus awards on Monday while Paris Saint-Germain was the Team of the...
